word: H4748 - מִקְשֶׁה - miqsheh - mik-sheh' - [idiom] well hair

sections.paragraph:
Original: מקשׁה

Transliteration: miqsheh

Phonetic: mik-sheh'

BDB Definition:

  1. turned work, well-dressed hair, well-set hair, turner's work
    1. meaning uncertain; possible referring to artistry of the hairdo

Origin: from H7185 in the sense of knotting up round and hard

TWOT entry: 2086a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
